name: linear-swarm-codex
description: Codex-native control plane for Linear Swarm. Codex handles Linear scope, orchestration, review, and merge planning while cheap-tier cloud workers implement code in Vercel Sandbox.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native swarm orchestration for Linear work.
interface.longDescription: Run Linear-scoped swarm work without nesting Claude Code. Codex owns scope audit, test design, review, and merge order while Vercel Sandbox workers execute cheap-tier cloud coding.
defaultPrompt: Run a Codex-native swarm for this Linear issue.
Scope this parent issue and fan out GLM 5.1 workers.
Review swarm branches and merge them in order.
